description: High-level file operations including copying, moving, and removal of files and directory trees.

functions.name: copy

params.name: src
params.description: Source file path.

params.name: dst
params.description: Destination file or directory path. If dst is a directory, the file is copied into it with the same basename.

functions.description: Copy the file src to the file or directory dst. Copies file data and permission mode. Does not preserve metadata (timestamps).

functions.name: copy2

params.name: src
params.description: Source file path.

params.name: dst
params.description: Destination file or directory path. If dst is a directory, the file is copied into it with the same basename.

functions.description: Copy the file src to the file or directory dst. Like copy() but also preserves file metadata (timestamps).

functions.name: copyfile

params.name: src
params.description: Source file path.

params.name: dst
params.description: Destination file path. Must be a complete target file name, not a directory.

functions.description: Copy the contents of the file src to the file dst. The destination must be a writable file name; directories are not accepted. Does not copy permissions or metadata.

functions.name: copyfileobj

params.name: fsrc
params.description: Source file-like object opened for reading.

params.name: fdst
params.description: Destination file-like object opened for writing.

params.name: length
params.description: Buffer size in bytes. If negative, the file is copied without chunking.

functions.description: Copy the contents of the file-like object fsrc to the file-like object fdst. Optionally specify a buffer size.

functions.name: copytree

params.name: src
params.description: Source directory path. Must exist.

params.name: dst
params.description: Destination directory path. Must not already exist; it will be created.

params.name: symlinks
params.description: If True, symbolic links are copied as symbolic links. If False (default), the contents of the linked files are copied.

params.name: ignore
params.description: A callable that receives the directory being visited and a list of its contents, and returns a set of names to ignore. Use ignore_patterns() to create one.

functions.description: Recursively copy an entire directory tree rooted at src to dst. The destination directory must not already exist. Permissions and times of directories are copied with copystat().

functions.name: rmtree

params.name: path
params.description: Directory tree to remove.

params.name: ignore_errors
params.description: If True, errors from failed removals are ignored. If False (default) and onerror is None, exceptions are raised.

params.name: onerror
params.description: Error handler called with (func, path, exc_info) when an error occurs. If omitted, errors raise exceptions.

functions.description: Delete an entire directory tree. Use with caution. If ignore_errors is True, errors are ignored; otherwise the onerror handler is called or exceptions propagate.

functions.name: move

params.name: src
params.description: Source file or directory path.

params.name: dst
params.description: Destination path. If dst is an existing directory, src is moved inside it.

functions.description: Recursively move a file or directory to another location. If the destination is an existing directory, src is moved inside it. Uses os.rename() when possible; otherwise copies then removes.

functions.name: make_archive
functions.signature: make_archive(base_name, format, root_dir=None, base_dir=None, verbose=0, dry_run=0, owner=None, group=None, logger=None)

params.name: base_name
params.description: Name of the archive file to create (without extension). Can include a full path.

params.name: format
params.description: Archive format: 'zip', 'tar', 'bztar', or 'gztar'.

params.name: root_dir
params.description: Directory that will be the root of the archive. Defaults to the current directory.

params.name: base_dir
params.description: Directory where archiving starts from. Defaults to root_dir.

params.name: verbose
params.description: Verbosity level. Deprecated; use logger instead.

params.name: dry_run
params.description: If True, do not actually create the archive.

params.name: owner
params.description: Owner name used when creating a tar archive. Defaults to the current owner.

params.name: group
params.description: Group name used when creating a tar archive. Defaults to the current group.

params.name: logger
params.description: Logger object for logging archive creation steps.

returns.description: Name of the created archive file.

functions.description: Create an archive file (such as zip or tar) and return its name. The base_name is the name of the file to create, including the path; the format determines the archive type.

functions.name: get_archive_formats

returns.description: List of (name, description) tuples for supported archive formats.

functions.description: Return the list of supported formats for archiving. Each element of the list is a (name, description) tuple.

functions.name: ignore_patterns

params.name: *patterns
params.description: Glob-style patterns for file and directory names to ignore.

returns.description: A function usable as the ignore argument to copytree().

functions.description: Create a callable that can be used as the ignore argument to copytree(). Files and directories matching any of the given glob-style patterns will be ignored.
